notes:
Added:
- Sign in with email: the login screen now accepts your username OR email — labels, placeholder and subtitle updated accordingly (English/Vietnamese).

Changed:
- "Kill All FFmpeg" moved from the top header into Settings → Updates & data, next to the other maintenance actions. Same confirm dialog and result toast as before; the header is now cleaner.
- Login screen title and subtitle are now localized (EN/VI) and follow the app language.
